items.title: The Trump Administration Defeated The ‘Seditious Six’ By ‘Going On Offense’
items.description: The 'Seditious Six' called for a mutiny, and the administration decided to 'go on offense and make them tap-dance a little.'

items.title: Tony Hinchcliffe Was Right
items.description: Despite Bad Bunny's arrogance, Puerto Rico would probably more resemble a hellscape than anything else without the patronage of the American people.

items.title: Pro-China Forces Sentence Hong Kong Freedom Fighter Jimmy Lai To 20 Years In Prison

items.title: The Super Bowl Halftime Show Was Literally About Erasing ‘America’
items.description: Bad Bunny naming the entire western hemisphere as one America was an open endorsement of open borders and the implicit rejection of nationhood.

items.title: Mike Macdonald’s Christian Worship Was The Bright Spot In This Year’s Depraved Super Bowl
